events.text: Amir Al Ammari (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! France 1, Iraq 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise.
Substitution, Iraq. Ali Al Hamadi replaces Aymen Hussein because of an injury.
Goal! France 2, Iraq 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.
Substitution, Iraq. Rebin Sulaka replaces Zaid Tahseen.
Substitution, Iraq. Youssef Amyn replaces Zaid Ismael.
Goal! France 3, Iraq 0. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.
Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.
Substitution, Iraq. Aimar Sher replaces Amir Al Ammari.
Substitution, Iraq. Marko Farji replaces Ibrahim Bayesh.
Substitution, France. Maghnes Akliouche replaces Bradley Barcola.
Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.
Substitution, France. Marcus Thuram replaces Kylian Mbappé.
